---
title: "Estimating cycling potential on route networks in Accra and Kathmandu"
description: "R Lovelace, N Groot, M Adepeju, and M Padgham (2018). Estimating cycling potential on route networks in Accra and Kathmandu. *World Health Organization*."
date: "2018-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_estimating_2018"
citation-type: "report"
citation-type-label: "Report"
venue: "World Health Organization"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "R Lovelace"
  - "N Groot"
  - "M Adepeju"
  - "M Padgham"
---

**Type:** Report
**Venue:** World Health Organization
**Year:** 2018

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

R Lovelace, N Groot, M Adepeju, and M Padgham (2018). Estimating cycling potential on route networks in Accra and Kathmandu. *World Health Organization*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@techreport{lovelace_estimating_2018,
  title = {Estimating Cycling Potential on Route Networks in {{Accra}} and {{Kathmandu}}},
  author = {Lovelace, R and Groot, N and Adepeju, M and Padgham, M},
  year = {2018},
  institution = {{World Health Organization}},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
